tagline: Custom Outdoor Living & Backyard Renovation in North Dallas

hero.headline:
Your Backyard Deserves a True
Transformation
hero.subheadline: Your outdoor space should feel like an extension of your home, not an afterthought. True Star Outdoor Solutions designs and builds custom patios, pergolas, outdoor kitchens, and complete backyard renovations across DFW — so you get a space you actually use.

services.label: What We Build
services.headline: Outdoor Living Spaces Built<br class="hidden md:block"> for the Way You Live
services.subtitle: From a shaded patio to a full backyard overhaul, every project is custom-designed, built by our own crews, and managed through one dedicated contact from start to finish.

cards.title: Patio Covers & Pergolas
cards.description: Custom-designed shade structures that extend your living space outdoors. From modern aluminum to stained cedar, every cover is built to match your home and handle Texas weather.

cards.title: Backyard Renovations
cards.description: Complete outdoor transformations from concept to completion. We reimagine your entire yard into a functional, beautiful space you actually want to spend time in.

cards.title: Paver Patios & Walkways
cards.description: Durable, stylish patios built with premium Belgard pavers in patterns that complement your home. Designed to last decades with minimal maintenance.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens
cards.description: Custom-built outdoor kitchens with stone countertops, built-in grills, refrigerators, and everything you need to entertain without going inside.

cards.title: Landscape Design & Install
cards.description: Professional landscape architecture with 2D and 3D renderings. See your project before we break ground, then watch our crews bring it to life.

cards.title: Artificial Turf & Sod
cards.description: Premium synthetic turf and fresh sod installation for lush, green lawns that stay beautiful year-round without the water bills or weekend mowing.

how_it_works.headline: From Vision to Backyard in Three Steps

steps.title: Schedule Your Design Consult
steps.description: Tell us what you envision. We visit your property, take measurements, and discuss your goals. Within days, you receive a detailed 3D rendering and transparent proposal.

steps.title: We Build It Right
steps.description: Our in-house crews handle every phase of construction — no subcontractors, no surprises. You get regular updates and a single point of contact from groundbreaking to final walkthrough.

steps.title: Enjoy Your New Outdoor Space
steps.description: Step into a backyard that fits the way you actually live. Host, relax, or just enjoy the view — and know that our team stands behind every detail with a quality guarantee.

about.label: Why DFW Homeowners Choose Us
about.headline: We Don't Just Landscape — We Build Outdoor Living
about.description: Founded in 2020 in Frisco, True Star Outdoor Solutions has completed over 400 projects across the DFW metroplex. As a Belgard Authorized Contractor with NDS drainage certification, our in-house crews deliver premium craftsmanship on every build. One dedicated project manager keeps you informed from design through final walkthrough — no chasing subcontractors, no communication gaps.

features.title: In-House Crews, No Subs
features.description: Every project is built by our own trained crews. No outsourcing, no handoff headaches — just consistent quality from start to finish.

features.title: 3D Renderings Before We Build
features.description: We provide detailed 3D visualizations so you see exactly what your finished project looks like before any construction begins.

features.title: On-Time, On-Budget Delivery
features.description: Clear timelines, transparent pricing, and regular updates. We respect your schedule, your property, and your investment.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every project gets a detailed proposal with clear scope, timeline, and pricing. No hidden fees, no change-order games — just honest numbers.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any element of your project doesn't meet the standards we agreed on, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. We use premium materials, proven installation methods, and stand behind our craftsmanship because your backyard is our reputation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical backyard renovation take?
faqs.answer: Most projects take 2-6 weeks depending on scope. A paver patio might be done in a week, while a full backyard renovation with a pergola and outdoor kitchen typically runs 4-6 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline in your proposal.

faqs.question: Do you handle the design or do I need an architect?
faqs.answer: We handle everything in-house. Our design team creates professional 2D and 3D renderings so you can visualize the finished project before we start building. No need to hire a separate designer or architect.

faqs.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. True Star Outdoor Solutions carries full liability insurance and workers compensation coverage. We are also a Belgard Authorized Contractor and NDS Professional Drainage Certified, so you know the work meets industry standards.

faqs.question: Do you serve areas outside of Frisco?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We serve the entire DFW metroplex including Plano, McKinney, Allen, Prosper, Celina, The Colony, Dallas, Flower Mound, Southlake, and more. If you are in the North Texas area, we can get to you.

faqs.question: What materials do you use for paver patios?
faqs.answer: We are a Belgard Authorized Contractor, which means we install premium Belgard pavers backed by a lifetime warranty. We also work with natural stone, travertine, and other premium materials depending on your design preferences.

testimonials.name: Dean P.
testimonials.text: We had an exceptional experience with True Star Outdoor Solutions. Eric and Cameron were professional, prompt, and a pleasure to work with. Their communication was outstanding, collaborating closely to plan every detail, and even six months later they followed up and addressed questions with care.

testimonials.name: Carolyn B.
testimonials.text: I am extremely pleased with the travertine patio extension, complete with brick wall exterior, tongue and grooved stained pine interior with TV, fireplace, and mantle. The quality of workmanship and attention to detail exceeded my expectations.
testimonials.context: Patio Extension & Outdoor Living, Frisco TX

testimonials.name: Lesa S.
testimonials.text: These guys are the best! They came out quickly to provide an estimate and were so helpful making great suggestions. Their work far exceeded expectations and pricing was reasonable. They really back up their work and were extremely knowledgeable.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation and detailed 3D rendering of your project. No pressure, no obligation — just a clear vision of what your outdoor space could become.
